'''âzh-z-p''' ('''kazhazap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unarchive|unarchive]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unarchive|unarchive]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-z-p
|-
! Lemma
| kazhazap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhazap|thizhazap]] || [[word:jizhazap|jizhazap]] || [[word:shizhazap|shizhazap]] || [[word:kizhazap|kizhazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhazap|thuthuzhazap]] || [[word:jujuzhazap|jujuzhazap]] || [[word:shushuzhazap|shushuzhazap]] || [[word:kukuzhazap|kukuzhazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhazap|thuzhazap]] || [[word:juzhazap|juzhazap]] || [[word:shuzhazap|shuzhazap]] || [[word:kuzhazap|kuzhazap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhazap|thuzhazap]] || [[word:juzhazap|juzhazap]] || [[word:shuzhazap|shuzhazap]] || [[word:kuzhazap|kuzhazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhazap|thezhazap]] || [[word:jezhazap|jezhazap]] || [[word:shezhazap|shezhazap]] || [[word:kezhazap|kezhazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhazap|thothozhazap]] || [[word:jojozhazap|jojozhazap]] || [[word:shoshozhazap|shoshozhazap]] || [[word:kokozhazap|kokozhazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhazap|thozhazap]] || [[word:jozhazap|jozhazap]] || [[word:shozhazap|shozhazap]] || [[word:kozhazap|kozhazap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhazap|thozhazap]] || [[word:jozhazap|jozhazap]] || [[word:shozhazap|shozhazap]] || [[word:kozhazap|kozhazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhazap|thĂŠzhazap]] || [[word:jĂŠzhazap|jĂŠzhazap]] || [[word:shĂŠzhazap|shĂŠzhazap]] || [[word:kĂŠzhazap|kĂŠzhazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhazap|thathazhazap]] || [[word:jajazhazap|jajazhazap]] || [[word:shashazhazap|shashazhazap]] || [[word:kakazhazap|kakazhazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhazap|thazhazap]] || [[word:jazhazap|jazhazap]] || [[word:shazhazap|shazhazap]] || [[word:kazhazap|kazhazap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhazap|thazhazap]] || [[word:jazhazap|jazhazap]] || [[word:shazhazap|shazhazap]] || [[word:kazhazap|kazhazap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhazap|shazhazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhazap|goshazhazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhazap|gokishazhazap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhazapnĂŒ|shazhazapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazapnknĂŒ|goshazhazapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazapnĂŒ|gokishazhazapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhazapshĂ«|shazhazapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkshĂ«|goshazhazapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhazapshĂ«|gokishazhazapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazapro|shazhazapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkro|goshazhazapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazapro|gokishazhazapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazapmu|shazhazapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkmu|goshazhazapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazapmu|gokishazhazapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhazapsher|shazhazapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhazapnksher|goshazhazapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhazapsher|gokishazhazapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhazapng|shazhazapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkng|goshazhazapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhazapng|gokishazhazapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhazapya|shazhazapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkya|goshazhazapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhazapya|gokishazhazapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhazapyam|shazhazapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkyam|goshazhazapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhazapyam|gokishazhazapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazapnĂŒshĂ«|shazhazapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhazapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhazapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazapnĂŒro|shazhazapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazapnknĂŒro|goshazhazapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazapnĂŒro|gokishazhazapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazapnĂŒmu|shazhazapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazapnknĂŒmu|goshazhazapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazapnĂŒmu|gokishazhazapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazapshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhazapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhazapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhazapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazapshĂ«ro|shazhazapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkshĂ«ro|goshazhazapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazapshĂ«ro|gokishazhazapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazapshĂ«mu|shazhazapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkshĂ«mu|goshazhazapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazapshĂ«mu|gokishazhazapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazapronĂŒ|shazhazapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkronĂŒ|goshazhazapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazapronĂŒ|gokishazhazapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazaproshĂ«|shazhazaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkroshĂ«|goshazhazapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazaproshĂ«|gokishazhazaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhazapromu|shazhazapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkromu|goshazhazapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhazapromu|gokishazhazapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhazapmunĂŒ|shazhazapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkmunĂŒ|goshazhazapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhazapmunĂŒ|gokishazhazapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhazapmushĂ«|shazhazapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkmushĂ«|goshazhazapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhazapmushĂ«|gokishazhazapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhazapmuro|shazhazapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhazapnkmuro|goshazhazapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhazapmuro|gokishazhazapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
